title: Changing the order of items in the drop-down menu
excerpt: I have a client who uses dropdown and monday forms. My client wants to personally sort the options he created in the dropdown. Currently, monday automatically lists these options alphabetically. Is there a way to prevent…

posts.author: ekinsogut (Ekin  Söğüt)
posts.cookedHtml: I have a client who uses dropdown and monday forms. My client wants to personally sort the options he created in the dropdown. Currently, monday automatically lists these options alphabetically. Is there a way to prevent this or have the client change the order automatically?

posts.author: AEN (Amy)
posts.cookedHtml: I know this was posted a while ago now - but I would also really like this functionality!
